info.name: Get activities for a specific rune

params.name: rune
params.description: The rune symbol for which activities are fetched.

params.name: offset
params.description: Pagination offset for the list of activities. Defaults to 0, increments must be multiples of 100, up to 5000.

items.docs: Get activities for a specific rune

params.name: window
params.description: Time window for which statistics are aggregated.

params.name: limit
params.description: Limit the number of results returned. Default is 20, maximum is 2000.

params.name: offset
params.description: Pagination offset for results.

params.name: sort
params.description: Column to sort the results by.

params.name: direction
params.description: Direction of the sort ('asc' for ascending, 'desc' for descending).

params.name: walletAddress
params.description: Filter results by a specific wallet address.

params.name: searchTerm
params.description: Filter collections by a search term.

params.name: allCollections
params.description: Include all collections in the results, regardless of activity.

info.name: Get orders for a specific rune

params.name: rune
params.description: The rune symbol for which orders are requested.

params.name: side
params.description: Filter by order side, currently only 'sell' orders are supported.

params.name: sort
params.description: Sorting order of the results. Default is 'unitPriceAsc'.

params.name: offset
params.description: Pagination offset for the results. Default is 0, and increments of 100 are supported up to 2000.

params.name: includePending
params.description: Whether to include pending orders in the results. Default is false.

params.name: rbfPreventionListingOnly
params.description: Whether to only include RBF protected rune orders. Default is false.

params.name: queryIssuerAddress
params.description: When "rbfPreventionListingOnly == true", filter the rune orders can be bought with RBF protection

items.docs: Get orders for a specific rune

params.description: The Bitcoin address to fetch Rune UTXOs for.

params.name: rune
params.description: Filter UTXOs by rune symbol.

params.name: sort
params.description: Sorting order of the UTXOs based on their balance. Defaults to 'balanceAsc'.

params.name: includeListed
params.description: Whether to include UTXOs that are currently listed in the marketplace. Defaults to false.
